contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that releases two accumulated references on a bpf_task_work_ctx object. It is called in the context of an irq_work callback to clean up the references transferred when scheduling the work (one for the task_work callback, one for the map's own ref). After this function returns, the context may be freed if its refcount reaches zero. The caller (the irq_work handler) must not access the context after this call, as it may be freed. The function is unconditional and void; no return value checking is needed.
